ham.subject: Google Workspace Security: New User Created – Review Required
ham.body:
Hello,

This is a notification from the Google Workspace Administration console. A new user has been added to your organization’s tenant.

Account: alex.smith@company.com
Created: 2026-03-04 09:15 UTC
IAM roles: Editor on all projects
Device: Windows 11

Please review the newly created user account details and ensure it complies with your security policies. You can view the log activity and manage permissions here: <URL>

Thank you,
Google Workspace Admin

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Google Account is at Risk – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected suspicious activity linked to your Google Account (alex.smith@company.com). To safeguard your personal data and prevent potential account shutdown, we must verify your identity immediately.

If you do not confirm your identity within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily suspended and all access will be revoked. Click the link below to verify now and avoid permanent suspension:

<URL>

Failure to comply may result in loss of access to all Google Workspace services.

Sincerely,
Google Account Security Team
